detail_desc: Jumper in soft, fine-knit cotton with long sleeves and ribbing around the neckline, cuffs and hem.
Fine-knit socks in a soft cotton blend with high shafts and elasticated tops.
KIDS EXCLUSIVE. Polo-neck collar in soft, rib-knit wool.
Derby shoes in imitation leather with lacing at the front, a welt seam around the soles and a loop at the back. Fabric linings and insoles. Heel 2.5 cm.
Trunks in stretch cotton jersey with flatlock seams, short legs, an elasticated waist and a lined front.
Top in a soft, fine-knit viscose blend with decorative buttons on the shoulders, short sleeves and ribbing around the neckline, sleeves and hem.

Short parka in a nylon and cotton blend with a lined, drawstring hood, zip and wind flap with press-studs down the front and flap side pockets with a press-stud. Long sleeves with an adjustable tab and press-stud at the cuffs, and a drawstring at the hem. Lined.
Calf-length dress in a rib knit with a sheen. Wrapover front with ties at the waist and long sleeves.
Sandals in grained imitation leather with open toes, an adjustable ankle strap with a metal buckle and covered heels. Imitation leather linings and insoles. Heel 8 cm.
Straight-cut nightslip in soft cotton jersey with a flock print text motif on the front, dropped shoulders and long sleeves. Straight-cut hem and slits in the sides.

Set with a short-sleeved bodysuit and pair of shorts with straps in an organic cotton blend. Bodysuit in soft jersey with buttons at the top, press-studs at the crotch and sewn-in turn-ups on the sleeves. Shorts in an airy textured weave with patch front pockets, sewn-in turn-ups at the hems and straps that cross at the back and button at the front.
Dress in lightweight, patterned sweatshirt fabric with press-studs at the back of the neck and long raglan sleeves with sewn-in turn-ups. Detachable belt in braided imitation suede.
Jumper in a soft jacquard knit containing some wool with long sleeves and ribbing around the neckline, cuffs and hem.
Fine-knit jumper in a soft merino wool blend with a round neck, long sleeves and ribbing at the cuffs and hem.
Ankle-length pull on-trousers in woven fabric. High waist with wide elastication and a small frill trim at the top, side pockets and straight, wide legs.
Long-sleeved top in soft, slub cotton jersey with an appliqué on the front and short slits in the sides. Slightly longer at the back.
Top in soft jersey made from a cotton blend with a round neckline and long sleeves.
Top in sweatshirt fabric with appliqués on the front, low dropped shoulders, wide sleeves and ribbing around the neckline, cuffs and hem. Soft brushed inside.
Hipster briefs in cotton jersey with a mid waist, lined gusset, wide sides and cutaway coverage at the back.
Mules in imitation leather with covered heels, square toes and a wide foot strap. Imitation leather linings and insoles. Heel 6 cm.
Top in soft cotton jersey with short puff sleeves.

Off-the-shoulder, ankle-length jumpsuit in woven fabric with a frill and silicone trim at the top, and support panels and wide elastication in the sides. Concealed zip at the back, seam at the waist and straight, wide legs.
Dress in lightweight sweatshirt fabric made from a cotton blend. Long sleeves with sewn-in turn-ups and a detachable belt in braided imitation suede.
Top in soft viscose jersey with a print motif on the front, short dolman sleeves and a tie detail at the hem.

Jacket in water-repellent functional fabric with a stand-up collar and a detachable hood with a print motif and appliqués. Zip down the front with a chin guard, flap front pockets with a press-stud, and elasticated cuffs. Lined. The jacket has a water-repellent coating without fluorocarbons.
Fine-knit socks.
Long-sleeved top in sweatshirt fabric made from a cotton blend with ribbing around the neckline, cuffs and hem. Soft brushed inside. The cotton content of the sweatshirt is organic.
5-pocket, ankle-length trousers in imitation leather with a high waist, zip fly and button and straight legs with seams just below the knees.
Warm-lined boots in glossy imitation leather with a zip in one side, lacing at the front and a loop at the back. Fabric linings and insoles and chunky soles. Heel approx. 2 cm.
Jumper in a soft, fine knit containing some wool with a rib-knit turtle neck, long raglan sleeves, ribbing at the cuffs and hem, and slits in the sides. Slightly longer at the back.
Off-the-shoulder top in soft viscose jersey with a gentle, lace-trimmed V-neck front and back and long sleeves.

Sleeveless top in a crinkled viscose weave with an inset lace trim down the front. Narrow cut with gathers at the top, short, narrow shoulder straps and an opening and button at the back of the neck. Seam with a flounce at the hem.
Push-up lace bralette with underwired, moulded, padded cups for a larger bust and fuller cleavage. Narrow, adjustable shoulder straps, a lace trim at the hem and a wide hook-and-eye fastening.
Cardigan in soft, fluffy faux fur with long sleeves and no fasteners. Jersey lining.
Fitted vest top in soft cotton jersey with lace trims around the neckline and armholes.
T-shirt in soft washed cotton jersey with worn details and a text print on the front.
Metal rings in various designs.
Flared, calf-length skirt in sturdy satin with a concealed zip in the side. Unlined.

Knee-length dress in sturdy jersey with a V-neck, sewn-in wrapover at the front with pleats at the top, and 3/4-length sleeves with a slit at the cuffs. Seam at the waist with a decorative metal buckle, a concealed zip in one side and a slit at the back.
5-pocket, knee-length shorts in washed, superstretch denim with an adjustable elasticated waist, zip fly and button and slim legs. Decorative seams at the knees, down the legs and at the hems.
Calf-length skirt in a patterned viscose weave with a concealed zip in one side and a seam and wide flounce at the hem. Unlined.
Lace tights with an elasticated waist.
Boxer briefs in cotton jersey with an elasticated waist and lined gusset.
Boxy-style hoodie in sweatshirt fabric with a jersey-lined hood. Dropped shoulders, long sleeves with ribbing at the cuffs, and a drawstring at the hem. Soft brushed inside.
T-shirt in slub linen jersey with a low-cut neckline.
Jumper in a soft, fine knit containing some wool. Low funnel collar, dropped shoulders, long, tapered sleeves and a straight-cut hem. The polyester content of the jumper is partly recycled.
Swim shorts in a patterned weave with an elasticated drawstring waist and fake fly. Side pockets, a back pocket and short legs with slits in the sides. Soft mesh inner shorts.
Derby shoes with pointed toes and lacing at the front. Canvas linings and insoles and smooth soles. Heel 2.5 cm.
Short, 5-pocket skirt in washed denim with a high waist, zip fly and button and broderie anglaise at the hem.

Imitation suede slingbacks with pointed toes, covered heels and an ankle strap with elastication at the back. Satin linings, imitation leather insoles and thermoplastic polyurethane (TPU) soles. Heel 5.5 cm.
T-shirt in soft cotton jersey with a round neckline with a narrow ribbed trim.
Round-necked T-shirt in slub cotton jersey with a chest pocket and short sleeves with sewn-in turn-ups.
Tunic in crinkled satin with a round neckline and a small opening and button at the back of the neck. Long puff sleeves with wide smocking at the cuffs. Seam with narrow ties under the bust.
5-pocket, ankle-length jeans in washed, stretch denim in a relaxed fit with a high waist, zip fly and button and straight legs with cut-off, raw-edge hems.
T-shirt in soft cotton jersey with a print motif on the front and slits in the sides.
Skinny-fit treggings in superstretch twill with an elasticated waist, fake front pockets and real back pockets.
Hoodie in soft faux shearling. Unlined, drawstring hood, gently dropped shoulders, long sleeves with ribbing at the cuffs, and narrow elastication at the hem.

Short, boxy jacket in sturdy, textured jersey with a collar, concealed press-studs down the front and a tab with press-studs at the hem. Large flap chest pockets with a press-stud, dropped shoulders and long sleeves with buttoned cuffs. Unlined.
5-pocket jeans in washed stretch denim with worn details, a high waist, button fly and slightly shorter, straight legs with raw-edge hems.
Trousers in softly draping twill with a regular waist and zip fly. Side pockets, welt back pockets and slim legs.
Dress and a pair of cycling shorts in soft, organic cotton jersey. Sleeveless dress with a seam and wide flounce at the hem. Cycling shorts with an elasticated waist.
Slingbacks with pointed toes, satin linings and imitation leather insoles.

Polo shirt in cotton piqué with a ribbed collar, button placket and long raglan sleeves. Muscle Fit – a fit designed to showcase the body’s natural physique with narrow shoulders and tapered sleeves to create a flattering silhouette.
Metal chain necklace with a pendant in the shape of a padlock. Adjustable length 46-53 cm.
Ballet pumps with pointed toes and satin linings and insoles.
Short skirt in an airy weave with an elasticated waist and tiers at the sides. Lined.
Scarf in soft, fine knit with a brushed finish. Fringes on the short sides. Size 65x180 cm.
Joggers in patterned jersey with a soft brushed finish. Drawstring at the waist, wide elasticated ribbing at the top, side pockets and ribbed hems.
Sports jacket with reflective details. Stand-up collar, zip down the front with a chin guard, diagonal side pockets with a concealed zip, and ribbing at the cuffs and hem.
Jumper knitted in a soft cotton blend containing some alpaca wool with pattern-knit sections and ribbing around the neckline, cuffs and hem.
Imitation leather ankle boots with elastic gores in the sides. Fabric linings and insoles and fluted soles. Heel 8 cm.
Shorts in an airy cotton weave with pleats at the front, a fake fly with a button, side pockets and fake welt back pockets.
T-shirts in soft cotton jersey with a press-stud on one shoulder (except in sizes 1½-4Y).
Cropped top in soft sweatshirt fabric with long sleeves and ribbing around the neckline and cuffs.
Plastic watch with an adjustable strap and metal buckle. Width of strap approx. 2 cm, total length 24 cm. Diameter of watch 3 cm.
Dress in a patterned viscose weave with a V-neck, covered buttons at the top and a gathered seam under the bust. Short sleeves and a seam at the waist that is elasticated at the back. Unlined.

Kangol x H&M. Knee-length, padded jacket with a stand-up collar, padded hood, two-way zip down the front and welt pockets at the top. Long sleeves, one with the Kangol logo at the top, and concealed elastication at the cuffs. Recycled polyester lining.
Jersey-lined cargo trousers in a cotton weave with an adjustable, elasticated waist and zip fly with a press-stud. Front pockets, a fake back pocket with a flap and flap leg pockets.

Set in soft organic cotton jersey with a print motif. T-shirt with press-studs on the shoulders. Shorts with ribbing and a decorative drawstring at the waist. Cap with elastication at the back and a soft peak.

Playsuit in a soft viscose weave with narrow, adjustable shoulder straps and a cut-out section at the back with a sewn-on bow at the top. Wide, elasticated seam at the waist, side pockets and wide legs.
Long-sleeved top in printed cotton jersey with ribbed cuffs.
Long-sleeved jumper in fine-knit cotton with ribbing around the neckline, cuffs and hem, and a small appliqué at the bottom.

Short parka in cotton twill with a jersey-lined drawstring hood and stand-up collar. Zip and wind flap with metal press-studs down the front, flap front pockets with a press-stud, and a short tab and press-stud at the cuffs. Jersey lining.
Top in soft cotton jersey with long raglan sleeves in a contrasting colour.

T-shirt in soft cotton jersey with ribbing around the neckline. Muscle Fit – a fit designed to showcase the body’s physique with narrow shoulders and tapered sleeves to create a flattering silhouette.
Shaping bikers in microfibre. High waist with a laser-cut edge and short legs with lace-trimmed hems. Light shaping effect on the waist, hips and bum.

Set with a long-sleeved bodysuit, pair of trousers and a hat in soft, organic cotton jersey. Bodysuit with press-studs on the shoulders and at the crotch. Trousers with wide, foldover ribbing at the waist. Hat with a ribbed hem.
Shorts woven in a linen blend with an elasticated, drawstring waist, side pockets, two fake back pockets and short slits in the hems.
Fitted jacket in woven fabric with notch lapels, and one button at the front. Flap front pockets, decorative buttons at the cuffs and a single back vent. Lined.

Short skirt in sweatshirt fabric. High waist with covered elastication and a drawstring, pockets in the side seams and a raw-edge hem. Soft brushed inside. The polyester content of the skirt is recycled.
Suit trousers in woven fabric with an adjustable, elasticated waist, zip fly and button, side pockets and fake welt pockets with a decorative button at the back. Legs with creases.
Soft cotton jersey leggings in different designs with an elasticated waist.
Ankle-length trousers in woven fabric with a high waist, concealed hook-and-eye fastener, zip fly and adjustable belt. Side pockets, fake welt back pockets and tapered legs with creases.

Ankle-length suit trousers in airy linen with a hook-and-eye fastening and zip fly. Side pockets, welt back pockets and tapered legs with creases. Slim Fit – a fit that is close-fitting at the thighs, knees and ankles to create a fitted silhouette.
Two-strand necklace of thin metal chains, one with a coin-shaped pendant and the other with plastic beads. Adjustable length 46-52 cm.
Hipster briefs in cotton jersey and lace with a low waist, lined gusset, wide sides and cutaway coverage at the back.
Ankle-length trousers in soft viscose jersey with covered elastication at the waist, side pockets and straight, wide legs.
Sandals with a zip at the back and strap around the ankle. Imitation suede insoles and rubber soles. Covered block heels approx. 8.5 cm.
Fitted top in ribbed jersey with a double-layered turtle neck and long sleeves.
Boxer shorts in organic cotton jersey with short legs, an elasticated waist and lined front.

Straight-cut blouse in a crisp organic cotton weave with smocking at the top. Square neckline with concealed elastication to keep the blouse in place, short, wide sleeves with a puff at the shoulders and narrow, covered elastication at the hems, and a rounded hem.
Hat in fast-drying functional fabric made partly from recycled polyester.

Short dress in woven fabric with notch lapels, buttons down the front and a yoke with a pleat at the back. Flap chest pockets, short sleeves with sewn-in turn-ups, and a tie belt at the waist. Unlined.
Long-sleeved top in hard-washed sweatshirt fabric with ribbing around the neckline, cuffs and hem. Brushed inside.
Knee-length skirt in a sturdy weave with a regular waist, decorative metal eyelets on the waistband, a concealed zip at the back and a sewn-in wrapover and slit at the front.
Vest top and shorts in soft organic cotton jersey. Patterned vest top with a frill-trimmed, rounded hem. Shorts with elastication and a decorative drawstring at the waist.
Trousers woven in a stretch cotton blend with a high waist, concealed zip in the side, side pockets and slim, ankle-length legs.
Sleeveless dress in woven fabric with glitter, a round neckline and buttons at the back. Seam at the waist with a large bow at the front and a flared skirt with several layers of tulle. Lined.
Short, fitted dress in a crinkled weave with a concealed zip at the back and short sleeves. Seam at the waist with a small frill trim and decorative tie belt, and pleats front and back. Unlined.

Short, A-line dress in a crêpe weave with an opening and button at the back of the neck. Short puff sleeves with narrow elastication at the hems, and gathered seams at the waist and hem creating tiers for added width. Sleeveless jersey underdress.
5-pocket slim-fit jeans in supersoft, stretch denim with an adjustable elasticated waist, zip fly and button, and narrow hems.
Top in lightweight sweatshirt fabric with ribbing around the neckline, cuffs and hem.
Set in soft organic cotton jersey. Short-sleeved, patterned bodysuit with press-studs at the shoulders and crotch. Shorts with an elasticated waist.
Short dress in a crêpe weave with concealed buttons down the front and a collar with appliqués. Long puff sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a seam at the waist and a gently flared skirt. Unlined.
Dressing gown in soft, patterned fleece with a hood, side pockets and tie belt at the waist.
Cardigan in soft, fine-knit cotton with a V-neck, buttons down the front and elbow patches in a contrasting colour.
Short, wide dress in woven fabric with a round neckline, small opening and button at the back of the neck, and long sleeves.
Pyjama shorts in soft, patterned jersey with an elasticated drawstring waist with a small frill trim at the top.

Ankle-length jumpsuit in a sturdy cotton weave with a collar, buttons at the top and open chest pockets. Low dropped shoulders and long sleeves with buttoned cuffs. Seam at the waist with pleats at the front, shaping darts at the back and a detachable tie belt. Relaxed fit with a zip fly and tapered legs with flap patch pockets. Unlined.
5-pocket, slim-fit jeans in stretch denim with a high waist, zip fly and button, and flared hems. The jeans are made partly from organic cotton.
V-neck jumper in a soft knit containing alpaca wool with low dropped shoulders, long sleeves and ribbing at the cuffs and hem.

Lightly padded jacket in windproof, water-repellent, breathable functional fabric with folded seams, a stand-up collar and zip down the front with a chin guard. Zipped chest pocket, diagonal front pockets and inner ribbing at the cuffs. Lined. The jacket has a water-repellent coating without fluorocarbons.
Small imitation leather shoulder bag with fringing and small printed text on the front, a braided shoulder strap and zip at the top. Lined. Size 15x19 cm.
Short, fitted dress in sequined, glittery jersey with a gently draped neckline at the front, narrow shoulder straps that cross at the back, and a short slit at one side of the hem. Lined.
Top in soft viscose jersey with a slight sheen and visible seams. Slightly wider neckline, short sleeves and a rounded hem. Longer at the back.
Scarf in a soft, airy weave with fringes on the short sides.
V-neck top in airy jersey made from a viscose blend with narrow adjustable shoulder straps.

Bomber jacket in a woven nylon blend with a thin hood that can be folded and zipped into the stand-up collar. Zip down the front, a zipped chest pocket, zipped front pockets and an inner pocket with a concealed press-stud. Ribbing at the cuffs and hem. Lined.
Shorts in cotton twill. High, frill-trimmed paper bag waist with elastication, and a zip fly with buttons. Side pockets and wide legs with sewn-in turn-ups.
Calf-length jumpsuit in a softly draping viscose weave. Narrow shoulder straps with a decorative knot, a smocked bodice with a frill trim at the top, side pockets and wide, straight legs.
Hat in braided paper straw with decorations and a twisted band. Width of brim 4 cm.

Super push-up bra in microfibre with underwired, thickly padded cups to maximise the bust and create a fuller cleavage, Adjustable shoulder straps, a wide hook-and-eye fastening at the back and elasticated ribbing at the hem. Designed with the minimum number of seams for a seamless, comfortable feel against the skin.
Fully lined printed swimsuit.
Short-sleeved nightdresses in soft, printed cotton jersey with a rounded hem. Slightly longer at the back.
Top in soft organic cotton jersey with short butterfly sleeves.
Calf-length skirt in a cotton crêpe weave with a high waist with elasticated smocking and a raw-edge frill trim at the top. Lined.
Fine-knit jumper in a soft mohair blend with a turtleneck, dropped shoulders and ribbing at the cuffs and hem.
Straight-cut double-breasted jacket woven in a viscose blend with notch lapels and flap front pockets. Lined.
Lightweight puffer jacket in a quilted weave with a detachable hood, zip down the front with a chin guard, and side pockets. Narrow elastication around the hood, cuffs and hem. Lined.
T-shirt in patterned cotton jersey.
Blouse in an airy cotton weave with embroidery, a small, frilled collar and buttons down the front. Gently dropped shoulders and long, slightly wider sleeves with narrow, buttoned cuffs.
Knee-length dress in a viscose weave with embroidery on the front, a deep V-neck and long sleeves with narrow elastication at the cuffs. Elasticated seam at the waist. Unlined.
Jumper in soft, fine-knit cashmere with long sleeves with wide sewn-in turn-ups, and ribbing around the neckline, cuffs and hem.
Wide-fitting, V-neck top in ribbed jersey with a large hood and long sleeves.
Boxy-stye top in lightweight sweatshirt fabric with a print motif. Unlined hood with a wrapover front, dropped shoulders, long sleeves and ribbing at the cuffs and hem.
Baby Exclusive. Puff pants in long-staple cotton with a single frill at the front, three frills at the back and elasticated hems.

Knee-length trenchcoat in a woven modal blend with notch lapels and 3/4-length sleeves with a tab and decorative button at the cuffs. Front pockets, a detachable tie belt at the waist, and slits in the sides. Unlined.
Short, circular dress in woven fabric with wide straps that cross at the front and tie at the back of the neck. Seam at the waist and a concealed zip and hook-and-eye fastening at one side. Unlined.

Two-piece dance costume with a glossy jersey body and a chiffon skirt. Body with gathers at the top, a low-cut back and short sleeves. Skirt with a glittery elastic waistband and a sewn-in wrapover at the front.
Tailored trousers in woven fabric with a concealed hook-and-eye fastener, zip fly, and side and back pockets. Straight-cut legs that taper to the hem with creases.
Long-sleeved top in soft sweatshirt fabric with a print motif, lined hood and ribbing at the cuffs and hem. Soft brushed inside.
Long-sleeved top in printed cotton jersey with ribbing around the neckline and cuffs, and short slits in the sides.
Shorts in washed, stretch denim with a fake fly, fake front pockets, back pockets and slim legs with sewn-in turn-ups at the hems. Wide jersey ribbing at the waist for optimum comfort.
Sleeveless jumpsuit in soft, heavily draping viscose jersey with spaghetti shoulder straps and a wrapover V-neck. Elasticated seam at the waist and straight, wide legs.
Fully lined, glittery swimsuit with spaghetti shoulder straps that join at the back and padded cups with removable inserts.
Joggers in soft, double-weave organic cotton with covered elastication and a drawstring at the waist, open leg pockets and elasticated hems.
Platform trainers with lacing at the front, cotton canvas linings and insoles and rubber soles. Platform 3.5 cm.

Biker jacket in soft imitation leather with quilted, padded sections on the shoulders, down the arms and at the back. Small stand-up collar, diagonal zip down the front and zipped front pockets. Lined.
Lace push-up bra with underwired, moulded, padded cups for light lift and a fuller cleavage. Adjustable, lace-trimmed shoulder straps that cross at the back and a hook-and-eye fastening.
Tiered skirt in soft, printed organic cotton jersey with an elasticated waist.
Top in soft velour with gently dropped shoulders, long sleeves and ribbing around the neckline, cuffs and hem.
Cropped top in lightweight, printed sweatshirt fabric. Hood with a wrapover front, low dropped shoulders and long sleeves with ribbed cuffs.

Padded jacket in windproof, water-repellent, breathable functional fabric with a detachable, lined hood, stand-up collar and zip down the front with a chin guard. Zipped side pockets and an adjustable hook and loop fastening and fleece inner ribbing at the cuffs. Slightly longer at the back. Reflective details. Lined. The jacket has a water-repellent coating without fluorocarbons.
Trousers in soft, patterned viscose jersey with side pockets, a low crotch and tapered legs. Wide, elasticated waistband for best fit over the tummy.
Short-sleeved top in printed cotton jersey.
Short-sleeved bodysuits in soft organic cotton jersey with lapped shoulders and press-studs at the crotch.

Long-sleeved shirt in soft cotton twill with a collar, buttons down the front and small embroidered detail on the chest. Contrasting colour on the inside of the collar stand and cuffs, and a rounded hem.

Shirt in a cotton weave with a turn-down collar, buttons down the front, a small embroidered detail on the chest and long sleeves with buttoned cuffs. Contrasting colour in the inside of the collar and cuffs.
Long-sleeved top in soft, organic cotton jersey with a decorative frill over the shoulders.
Long-sleeved jumper in a soft knit containing some wool with dropped shoulders and slits in the sides with ties. Ribbing around the neckline, cuffs and hem.
Kaftan in an airy, patterned weave with buttons down the front and open sides held together by a button.
Lace push-up bralette with moulded, padded cups for a larger bust and fuller cleavage. Adjustable, lace-covered shoulder straps and a hook-and-eye fastening at the back.
Swim shorts in woven fabric with an elasticated drawstring waist, fake fly, side pockets and short legs with slits in the sides. Soft mesh inner shorts.

Super push-up bra in microfibre and lace with underwired, thickly padded cups to maximise the bust and create a fuller cleavage. Narrow, adjustable shoulder straps and a narrow fastening at the back with two pairs of hooks and eyes.
Large, round sunglasses with slim frames and sidepieces in metal and plastic. Adjustable nose pads and tinted, UV-protective, shimmering metallic lenses.
Faux fur trainers with embroidery at the front, elastic gores in the sides and a loop at the back. Fabric linings and insoles and rubber soles.
Long-sleeved top in soft sweatshirt fabric with a jersey-lined, drawstring hood, kangaroo pocket and ribbing at the cuffs and hem. Soft brushed inside.
Flip flops with rubber straps (elastic around the heels in sizes 7 to 9 1/2) and fluted rubber soles with a print motif on top.

Chinos in stretch cotton twill with a zip fly and button, diagonal side pockets and welt back pockets with a button. Skinny Fit – a fit with slightly shorter legs that is close-fitting at the thighs, knees and ankles to create a completely fitted silhouette.
T-shirt in premium cotton jersey.

Ankle-length trousers in a soft weave. High paper bag waist with elastication at the back and a sewn-on tie belt at the front. Fly with decorative buttons, diagonal side pockets and sewn-in turn-ups at the hems.
Long-sleeved top in block-coloured cotton jersey. Panel with a text print down the sleeves, ribbing around the neckline and cuffs, and slits in the sides. Slightly longer at the back.
Wide, V-neck sports top in soft, fast-drying functional fabric with decorative straps at the neckline, short cap sleeves and a rounded hem. Gathers in the sides for best fit over the tummy.
Shorts in soft, superstretch denim with an adjustable elasticated waist and zip fly and press-stud. Fake front pockets, real back pockets and sewn-in turn-ups at the hems.

Baby Exclusive. Sleeveless romper suit in an organic cotton crêpe weave with frill-trimmed shoulder straps that cross at the back. Elastication and a frill trim at the top, concealed press-studs at the crotch and down the legs, and elasticated hems. Sizes 9M-4Y with an elasticated seam at the waist.
Fully lined bikini bottoms with a mid waist and cutaway coverage at the back.
Straight-cut jacket in a crêpe weave with sequined embroidery, a small stand-up collar and no fasteners. Lined.

Non-wired bra in lace with narrow decorative straps at the front and moulded, lightly padded cups that give the bust a natural shape and light support. Narrow adjustable shoulder straps and a hook-and-eye fastening at the back.

Imitation suede biker jacket with notch lapels with decorative press-studs, a diagonal zip down the front and zipped side pockets. Long sleeves with a zip at the cuffs and a sewn-on, adjustable belt with a metal fastener at the hem. Lined.
Joggers in soft sweatshirt fabric with elasticated ribbing and a drawstring at the waist, side pockets and tapered legs with ribbed hems.
Jacquard-knit socks in a soft cotton blend with elasticated tops.
Fitted top in jersey with short sleeves.
Long-sleeved top in hard-washed sweatshirt fabric with ribbing around the neckline, cuffs and hem. Brushed inside.
Pull-on trousers in a soft weave with an elasticated drawstring waist, side pockets, fake back pockets and tapered legs with elasticated hems.
Shorts in a cotton weave with a frill-trimmed elasticated waist with a decorative bow at the front, and elasticated hems.
Short, 5-pocket shorts in washed stretch denim with worn details, a regular waist, zip fly and raw-edge hems.
Fully lined swimsuit with a V-neck and low-cut back with fixed lacing. Medium coverage at the back.
5-pocket ankle-length trousers in stretch cotton corduroy with a high waist, zip fly and button, and straight legs with raw-edge hems.
Platform trainers with lacing at the front, cotton canvas linings and insoles and rubber soles. Platform 3.5 cm.
Belt in imitation leather with a metal buckle decorated with beads. Width 3.5 cm.

Set with a long-sleeved bodysuit, pair of leggings and accessory in soft organic cotton jersey. Bodysuit with press-studs at the crotch and a print motif on the front. Leggings with foldover ribbing at the waist.
T-shirts in soft cotton jersey with a press-stud on one shoulder (except in sizes 1½-4Y).
Swim shorts with an elasticated drawstring waist. Soft mesh inner shorts.
Long-sleeved bodysuits in soft organic cotton jersey with press-studs at the crotch.

Set with a dress and leggings in soft jersey. Dress in patterned cotton with 3/4-length sleeves with frilled cuffs, fastening with concealed press-studs at the back, a seam at the waist and a gently flared skirt. Leggings with an elasticated waist and scalloped hems.
Derby shoes in imitation suede with decorative welt seams and open lacing at the front. Fabric linings and insoles. Heel approx. 2.5 cm.

Track jacket in sturdy jersey with a mesh-lined drawstring hood and a zip down the front. Long raglan sleeves with narrow elastication at the cuffs and mesh-lined side pockets with a taped zip. Unlined.
Waterproof hi-tops in imitation leather with a lightly padded edge and tongue, lacing at the front and a loop at the back. Mesh linings and insoles and rubber soles.
Ballet pumps with a heart-shaped metal decoration. Fabric linings and insoles and thermoplastic rubber (TPR) soles.
Short jacket in textured fabric with raw fringe trims, front pockets and no fastenings. Lined.
